chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 951 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.4025/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 07.09.2023 Mr. Bakhshan Khan Mahar, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Abdul Ghaffar Soomro, Advocate for respondents No.7 to 12. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioners are members of Sukkur Cooperative Housing Society, have challenged election process of housing society held on 30th April 2023 on the grounds of being fake and in violation of relevant bylaws and rules. We have heard learned Counsel for petitioners. He has failed to satisfy us about his failure to take the dispute between petitioners and respondents before the relevant Court notified under the Sindh Cooperative Societies Act, 2020, for its decision in accordance with law. The relevant notification has been produced by learned AAG Sindh along with other such orders in support of his arguments opposing the petition on the point of maintainability. We, therefore, dismiss this petition being non-maintainable, leaving the petitioners, however, at liberty to approach the relevant Court for redresssal of their grievances, if so advised. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
